A Python Environment has been configured.  
Following is the information about the Python environment:

2. Version: 3.12.2

3. Command Prefix to run Python in a terminal is: `C:/Users/chris/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe`
Instead of running `Python sample.py` in the terminal, you will now run: `C:/Users/chris/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe sample.py`
Similarly instead of running `Python -c "import sys;...."` in the terminal, you will now run: `C:/Users/chris/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe -c "import sys;...."`
